hero.title:
Spanish verbs,
finally on your side.
hero.subtitle: Five minutes a day. ConjuGab brings the right verb at the right time — with feedback that actually teaches.

items.title: Pick your battle.
items.body: Choose a tense and a verb class. We show the verbs you're actually struggling with — no random exercises.

items.title: Type the form.
items.body: No multiple choice. Real typing builds real muscle memory. Press ⏎ to check.

items.title: Build the streak.
items.body: Five minutes today. Then tomorrow. ConjuGab remembers what you've forgotten and brings it back.

items.label: Verbs in the app
items.description: Conjugated in 14 tenses. Yes, all of them.

footer.tagline: Spanish verbs, finally on your side.

pricing.title: Simple. Transparent.
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when you want more. No subscription tricks, no fine print.

practice.title: Ready to practice?
practice.subtitle: Practice mode is being built. Soon you'll be able to train verbs in all tenses here — with targeted feedback and streak tracking.

tenses.title: Tenses at a glance
tenses.subtitle: Choose a tense to practice in a targeted way. ConjuGab guides you through all forms — step by step.

items.desc: Present — what's happening now or always true.
